title: The Legacy Of The Deep - TLOTD
description:
Welcome to The Legacy Of The Deep, AKA TLOTD!

This modpack includes new dimensions, structures, biomes, tree types, food, crops, swords, armor, ores, chests and so much more!
body:
Welcome to The Legacy Of The Deep, AKA TLOTD!

I originaly made this modpack to play with my friends, but i decided i wanted to upload it since everyone is spending more time on the modpack than on their 9-5.

I find this modpack extremely fun, if it is possible ill upload 2 versions, one being Standard and one being the Shaders&Textures version, where i import my textures that i use for this modpack.

This modpack includes new structures, biomes, tree types, food, crops, swords, armor, ores, chests and so much more!

Experience The Legacy Of The Deep!

And go have fun!
